com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class TEInputRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.AbstractTERequest
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEInputRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITERequest

    public class TEInputRequest
extends AbstractTERequest
    A generic input request is used to send to and retrieve a value from the management.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 17

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest

        ITERequest.Kind

      Create a TE input request

      • Methods inherited from class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.AbstractTERequest

        getKind, getSessionId

    • Constructor Detail

      • TEInputRequest

        public TEInputRequest(java.lang.String sessionId,
                      java.lang.String signature,
                      java.lang.String message,
                      java.lang.String encoding,
                      byte[] encodedValue,
                      float duration)
        Create a TE input request
        Parameters:
        signature - a function identifier to be called on the TTman client
        message - an text message displayed to the user
        encoding - input value encoding
        encodedValue - the encoded input value
        duration - the duration the SUT request should be active in seconds, -1 waits indefinite

    • Method Detail

      • getMessage

        public java.lang.String getMessage()
        Get the TE input request text message or a function identifier to be called on the TTman client
        Returns:
        message

      • getEncoding

        public java.lang.String getEncoding()
        Returns:
        input value encoding

      • getEncodedValue

        public byte[] getEncodedValue()
        Returns:
        the encoded input value

      • getDuration

        public float getDuration()
        Returns:
        the duration the SUT request should be active in seconds, -1 waits indefinite

      • getSignature

        public java.lang.String getSignature()
        Returns:
        a function identifier to be called on the TTman client side
